summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Walmart Receipt Generator with new Save/Load functionality, camera barcode scanning, and shared receipt improvements. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality mostly working with one minor clipboard permission issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard permission error causing runtime error overlay
ui_bugs.details: NotAllowedError: Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied

passed_tests: Backend health endpoints (/api/, /api/health) - 100% success
UPC lookup API with MongoDB caching (/api/products/lookup/{upc})
Receipt calculation API with accurate tax math (/api/receipts/calculate)
PDF generation API with valid PDF output (/api/receipts/generate-pdf)
NEW: Save Receipt API - POST /api/receipts/save creates saved receipt
NEW: List Saved Receipts API - GET /api/receipts/saved returns receipt list
NEW: Get Saved Receipt API - GET /api/receipts/saved/{id} returns specific receipt
NEW: Update Saved Receipt API - PUT /api/receipts/saved/{id} updates receipt
NEW: Delete Saved Receipt API - DELETE /api/receipts/saved/{id} deletes receipt
Share Receipt API - POST /api/receipts/share creates shared receipt
Get Shared Receipt API - GET /api/receipts/shared/{id} returns shared data
Header has Load, Save, Reset buttons with correct data-testid attributes
Save button opens Save Receipt modal with name input field
Load button opens Load Receipt modal with saved receipts list
Camera scan button appears on each item row with data-testid
Date/time in receipt footer shows original format (spaced with spaces, not justify-content)
# ITEMS SOLD is large (16px), bold (700), and centered
VERIFIED: Shared receipt page does NOT have Download PDF button
Receipt calculations work correctly with live updates
Share receipt functionality creates shareable links
Reset button clears form data
Add item functionality with camera scan integration
Save/Load receipt integration with backend APIs
Receipt preview updates in real-time
All form inputs have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, 1 minor clipboard issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix clipboard permission error in share receipt functionality. The error 'NotAllowedError: Failed to execute writeText on Clipboard: Write permission denied' is causing a runtime error overlay. Consider using a fallback method for sharing or handling the permission gracefully.
